name: Reducer Action Coverage
description: Redux/useReducer reducers should be decomposed to verify that every action type is handled and produces a valid state.
rationale: Reducers with missing action handlers silently return the previous state, which can cause subtle bugs. Decomposition reveals every action × state combination and whether the result is well-defined.

examples.passes: Formalize(cartReducer) → Decompose → all 24 action/state combinations produce valid states
examples.fails: cartReducer does not handle 'APPLY_DISCOUNT' when cart is empty (returns stale state)
